problem id: e893d523
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) XOR SHR(2)

examples:
  11011111 -> 10001000
  00000010 -> 00000100
  10101111 -> 01110100
  01001111 -> 10001101
  11011000 -> 10000111
  00011011 -> 00110000
  00111111 -> 01110001
  10111001 -> 01011101
  01010001 -> 10110110

query: 01101001
predicted answer: 11001000
